description: LLM providers that issue their own API keys, with suggested models for RAG pipelines vs. reasoning and dialogue.

usage.rag: Embeddings, retrieval, chunking, summarization for indexing — prefer fast/cheap or dedicated embed models.
usage.dialogue: Agent chat, command building, deep analysis, long-post processing — prefer frontier reasoning models.
usage.local: Providers with local=true use connection.defaultBaseUrl (or connection.baseUrlEnv). Model ids are defaults only — at setup, user must pick names that exist on their Ollama/LM Studio server. API keys optional when apiKeyRequired is false.
usage.singleKey: One LLM API key per user instance. If models.rag.id or models.dialogue.id is null, the defined id is used for both RAG and dialogue.

providerFields.local: When true, provider is user-hosted; see connection.
providerFields.connection: Local only: defaultBaseUrl, baseUrlEnv (override), protocol (ollama | openai_compatible).
providerFields.apiKeyRequired: When false, CLI may skip API key; runtime uses base URL only.
providerFields.models.rag.id: Embedding or chat model id sent to the provider API.
providerFields.models.dialogue.id: Chat model id for ADK agent turns.

rag.notes: Cost-effective vectors for note/KB indexing; use text-embedding-3-large for higher recall.

dialogue.notes: Strong reasoning and tool use; gpt-4o-mini for lighter agent turns.

rag.notes: No first-party embeddings; use for chunk summaries, metadata extraction, and light RAG QA.

dialogue.notes: Balanced agent dialog; claude-opus-4-* for hardest analysis tasks.

rag.notes: Gemini embedding model for vector stores; pairs well with ADK on Google stack.

dialogue.notes: Long context and strong reasoning; gemini-2.5-flash for faster replies.

rag.notes: Dedicated embeddings; codestral-embed for code-heavy repos.

dialogue.notes: Flagship chat; mistral-small-latest for cheaper agent loops.

rag.notes: RAG-focused vendor; command-r-plus-08-2024 also does retrieval-augmented chat in one model.

dialogue.notes: Enterprise agent and analysis; strong tool and document workflows.

rag.notes: Low-cost extraction and summarization over chunks; pair with a separate embed API if needed.

dialogue.notes: Chain-of-thought style analysis and complex agent planning.

rag.notes: Very fast batch summarization; no native embeddings — add OpenAI/Voyage embeds separately.

dialogue.notes: Higher-quality open-weight dialog on Groq LPU inference.

rag.notes: Open embedding endpoints; BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 also available on Together.

dialogue.notes: Hosted open models for agent chat and analysis.

rag.notes: Popular open embed model on Fireworks inference.

dialogue.notes: Fast hosted Llama for agents; qwen2p5-72b-instruct for multilingual notes.

rag.notes: No separate embed API; use for semantic tagging and chunk summaries.

dialogue.notes: Latest Grok for deep reasoning and long-context dialog.

rag.notes: Search-grounded retrieval and citations; good for live context, not local vector DB alone.

dialogue.notes: Stronger analysis with web grounding; sonar-reasoning-pro for harder tasks.

rag.notes: Single API key routes to many providers; pick any supported embed model by full slug.

dialogue.notes: Unified billing across vendors; swap slug per task without new keys.

rag.notes: Deploy embedding model in Azure AI Foundry; deployment name may differ from model id.

dialogue.notes: Enterprise OpenAI models with Azure AD and regional residency.

rag.notes: IAM-based access; cohere.embed-english-v3 also available in Bedrock.

dialogue.notes: Multi-vendor catalog under one AWS account; model IDs are region-specific.

rag.notes: Specialist embeddings; often paired with Anthropic/OpenAI for chat.

dialogue.notes: Embeddings-only provider — use Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google for agent dialogue.

rag.notes: Multilingual and long-document embeddings.

dialogue.notes: Search/RAG agent API; for pure chat prefer a full LLM provider.

rag.notes: Long-context summarization over note corpora.

dialogue.notes: Stronger analysis and structured extraction.

rag.notes: Qwen embedding family for vector indexes.

dialogue.notes: Flagship Qwen for agents; qwen-plus for lower cost.

rag.notes: GLM embedding API for knowledge bases.

dialogue.notes: Top-tier GLM for reasoning; glm-4-flash for speed.

rag.notes: Serverless or dedicated inference; model id depends on chosen provider route.

dialogue.notes: Access many open models with one HF token and provider billing.

rag.notes: Example embed deployment; browse replicate.com/collections/embeddings for current versions.

dialogue.notes: Pay-per-run open models; pin version hashes for production.

rag.notes: Multilingual dense retrieval.

dialogue.notes: Hosted open models with competitive pricing.

rag.notes: Strong Chinese/English retrieval; many open embed endpoints.

dialogue.notes: Aggregates DeepSeek, Qwen, and other open weights behind one key.

connection.notes: Pull models on the host: ollama pull nomic-embed-text && ollama pull llama3.2. From bare metal use http://127.0.0.1:11434.

rag.notes: Default embed model; override id to any embedding model installed in Ollama.

dialogue.notes: Default chat model; override id to match ollama list (e.g. qwen2.5, mistral).

connection.notes: Enable the local server in LM Studio; load embed + chat models. Path /v1 matches OpenAI client SDKs.

rag.notes: Use the exact model id shown in LM Studio for the loaded embedding model.

dialogue.notes: Replace with the loaded chat model id from LM Studio (often the GGUF filename or server label).
